description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a realistic human form and proportions. The figure is upright, with arms positioned naturally at the sides and legs straight, suggesting a neutral standing posture. The head is proportionate to the body, and facial features are visible, though not highly detailed. The clothing appears to be fitted and modern, with a jacket or coat as the outer garment, and the lower body covered by straight-cut pants. The shoes are closed-toe and appropriate for urban walking. The overall appearance is that of a typical city dweller, ready for movement in an urban environment.
description: A realistically proportioned adult pedestrian in modern fitted clothing, standing upright with arms at the sides and straight legs.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the face, chest, and front of the legs, with arms visible at the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and the straight alignment of the legs and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with the outline of the jacket or coat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the arm and leg contours visible.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket or coat with straight-cut pants
